description: Case style: Steel case with a fixed bezel for added durability, style and comfortDial style: Silver oval dial with branding at the 3 hour mark and brand logo at the 12 hour mark, quartz movement of time display Strap style: Denim strap with a tang clasp for comfort and styleFeatures: Screw to reset time, solid case back made of stainless steel for enhanced durabilityWater resistant up to 30 metersWarranty: 2 years on mechanism only (1 year on battery and strap)
